title: Process Engineer Vacancy at H.B. Fuller India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at H.B. Fuller India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at H.B. Fuller India are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Rajkot. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About H.B. Fuller India:
H.B. Fuller India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with H.B. Fuller India!
